minActivationPercent.comment: Minimum Rage percentage required for activation (default: 50%)

rageCostDuringQTE.comment: Rage cost for activation during QTE/H-scene (default: 50%)

damageMultiplier.comment: Damage multiplier for physical and magic damage during Rage (default: 2.0x)

spGainPercent.comment: SP gain per attack click during Rage as percentage of max SP (default: 0.5 = 50%)

enemyPushbackForceMultiplier.comment: Force multiplier for enemy pushback on Rage activation (default: 100.0, range: 200-300px)

grabDrainMin.comment: Rage drain per second when grabbed at 0% MindBroken (default: 1.0%/sec)

grabDrainMax.comment: Rage drain per second when grabbed at 100% MindBroken (default: 10.0%/sec, linear interpolation)

slowMoDrainMultiplier.comment: Multiplier for SlowMo rage drain (default: 2.0x, base drain * 2.0)

slowMoMBGainMultiplier.comment: Multiplier for SlowMo MindBroken gain (default: 2.0x, base gain * 2.0)

uiPositionX.comment: Rage UI X position from left edge (default: 360px)

uiPositionY.comment: Rage UI Y position from top edge (default: -25px, negative = down from top)
